entries.title: Missing covering index (creator_id, status) on novel_pool_entries and inspiration_items
Spec gaps — novel-work-pool.md path still hard-codes Works/_pool/灵感池/; cli-spec.md path missing; inspiration --idea behavior undocumented
DAO archive functions should accept creator_id explicitly for defense-in-depth
entries.scope: novel_pool_entries.rs:159 + inspiration_items.rs:219 (after fix wave: with creator_id param)
entries.closure_note: V1.42 P-last T1: waived — defense-in-depth parameter; current handlers already validate creator_id at the API layer. Defer to V1.43+.

entries.title: CLI --set-default on pool promote makes 2 round-trips; second can fail independently
entries.closure_note: V1.42 P-last T1: waived — optimization; both round-trips succeed independently. No data loss if second fails. Defer to V1.43+ when pool promote can be made atomic server-side.

entries.title: PoolEntryDto/InspirationItemDto expose creator_id (inconsistent with WorkApiDto contract R-V133P1-10)
entries.closure_note: V1.42 P-last T2: added #[serde(skip_serializing)] on creator_id for PoolEntryDto and InspirationItemDto. API consumers no longer see creator_id in pool/inspiration responses.

entries.title: title_to_slug for pure-CJK titles produces 'untitled' — UX could be improved with short-id fallback
entries.closure_note: V1.42 P-last T2: added idea-<hex> short-id fallback in title_to_slug for pure-CJK titles. When no ASCII chars are extractable, a deterministic hex suffix is appended (e.g. idea-a1b2c3) instead of producing 'untitled'.

entries.title: Inspiration slug collision returns error instead of auto-suffixing
entries.closure_note: V1.42 P-last T2: added auto-suffix on collision. create_inspiration_with_scaffold now appends -2, -3, etc. to slug when file exists, instead of returning an error.

entries.title: creator works pool help text is long — could split per PoolAction

entries.title: Add structured tracing::info! spans for pool/inspiration mutations (add/promote/archive)
entries.closure_note: Closed V1.46 P4 pool observability; tracing::info! on 9 mutation paths.

entries.title: .sqlx/ offline cache not refreshed for inspiration_items + new queries (sqlx-cli unavailable)
